entry.title: Re: Import Sales Dimensions
entry.content:
Hi @Felipe_Lima 

- I need to update the "Sales UoM Dimensions" of item "Test" in the screenshot below. 

- As you can see the "UoM Group" is "PC" and it includes many UoM and "Carton-15PC" UoM is one of them that I want to edit it's "Sales UoM Dimensions" 

- The "UoM Abs. Entry" of "PC" is 42 while "Carton-15PC" is 19

          

 

- When I tried to import the templates in the link below using "Unicode Text" I got the error below. 

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OH6p1kBPXvIiB8L5iWKKHYMXh3anNh0k/view?usp=drive_link

- Also for your reference the update file was not open in the background while running the DTW and trying.

entry.title: CTMS: One dev node to multiple targets
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We have a requirement in our project to setup Charm for the Cloud transports.

We created a PoC with two scenarios:
Scenario 1: One Change cycle with Dev->QUA->PRD sub accounts
Scenario 2: One change cycle with Dev-> QUA and PPRD -> PRD and VPRD

Scenario 1 works fine.

In scenario 2 we are not able to view the transports which are created and released in Dev sub accounts.
Referred the note DIGITS in which it explains that Dev node can only have one target. Why is this restriction and with this setting we are not able to use Charm integration with CTMS with Global dev and regional Sub accounts.

Is there any solution to handle this issue?

Thanks and Regards,
Vijay


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CTMS: One dev node to multiple targets
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

As you already see from note: ##2929892, currently "a development transport node can have only one target.", this is the limitation for integration between ChaRM and Cloud TMS.

If you need one dev node to multiple targets, you may involve our consulting service team to see if customization could help here or not. In standard, we don't support such scenario for now. Thanks for the understanding.

Best regards,

Shawn

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
CODEMIGRATION

One of the key requirements. For example when the developer wants to migrate from javascript to typescript in ui5.It is very useful and i saw that joule is doing a very great job in that.

entry.title: Re: Download button for Bonus Assignment statement in Peo...

@S0026446342 @WouterVdp @alejandroazca 

Our Product team confirmed this was never and is still not supported.

I shared the enhancement request @WouterVdp created with them.

  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/343007

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Standard Extractor for SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace is Released
entry.content:
Introduction

Prior to February 26, 2025, SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace provided samples extractor codes for our customers.

On February 26, 2025, the first version of standard extractor is delivered as part of standard codes in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS3.

We recommend you using standard extractor codes for extracting the TM freight documents, such as freight unit, freight order and freight booking. However, the delivery of standard extractor codes doesn't affect your current implementation using sample extractor codes. If you want to migrate from sample extractor codes to standard version, see Migration to Standard Extractor Codes.

Standard extractor code VS Sample extractor code

CategorySupported S/4HANA VersionConfigurationImplementationCompatibility ChangeAdapting the extractor codeSupported scenario
Standard extractor codes first versionSAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS3BC set supportedBasis of customer needs to upgrade to supported S4 version or download and install the notesCustomer CANNOT down port it to lower S/4 HANA versions or ECC series of productsNew released codes will not overwrite the customization code1.Freight Unit -> Road Freight Order / Ocean Booking / Air Booking.
2.Supports parcel tracking and container tracking in the TM scenario
  Four tracking scenarios are supported.
     1.Tracking Based on Freight Order/Booking
     2.Generate Tracking Units Based on Freight Order/Booking
     3.Generate Tracking Units Based on Freight Unit
     4.Generate Tracking Unit Based on Container Unit
Samples extractor codesFrom SAP S/4HANA 1909 SP03  to SAP S/4HANA 2022 BC set supportedABAP developer of customer needs to download code from Sample GitHub and install the codeCustomer CAN down port it to lower S/4 HANA versions or ECC series of productsNew released code will overwrite the customization code(For example,download the latest code via ABAPGit,it will overwrite the customization code which written by customer)1.Purchase Order -> Inbound Delivery -> Shipment.
2.Purchase Order -> Inbound Delivery -> Freight Unit -> Road Freight Order / Ocean Booking / Air Booking.
3.Sales Order -> Outbound Delivery -> Shipment.
4.Sales Order -> Outbound Delivery -> Freight Unit -> Road Freight Order / Ocean Booking / Air Booking.
Stock Transport Order (STO) Scenarios:
5.Purchase Order -> Outbound Delivery -> Shipment.
6.Purchase Order -> Outbound Delivery -> Freight Unit -> Road Freight Order / Ocean Booking / Air Booking.
7. Supports parcel tracking and container tracking in the TM scenario
  Four tracking scenarios are supported.
      1.Maintain Reference Document on Freight Order/Freight Booking
      2.Maintain Tracked Objects on Freight Order/Freight Booking
      3.Maintain Tracked Objects on Freight Unit
      4.Maintain Tracked Objects on Container Unit

Reference document

How to Send Documents from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace

entry.title: Re: Event Based Production and WIP reversal

entry.title: Re: Event Based Production and WIP reversal
entry.content: If you reverse TECO, system will calculate WIP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One SDK - LoadFromDataSource(), FlushToD...
entry.content: Can I bind this to my own custom form? Or I need to use system created UDO form.

entry.title: Grouping HFDV has not been assigned to any customer accounts.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have done the configuration Vendor Master Configuration,

Defined the account groups with screen layouts for Vendor Tcode OBD3

Also Create the Number Ranges for Vendor Accounts Tcode XKN1

Assign Number ranges to vendor Account Groups Tcode DBAS

 

Then Define the number range for Business partner Tcode BUCF

Also Define Groupings and Assign number ranges

Finally Link the Business Partner with Supplier/Vendor

Still am getting this error "Account Group is not been assigned to any customer accounts", but am creating the Vendor Code for supplier why the error is coming for customer accounts...!! Please help

Hope you understood my query

entry.title: Re: SAP Joule - Identity Provisioning - No assigned Roles displayed
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,

Now I understand which step you are talking about. In my case, I do have 4 user roles provisioned. 

What does the Provision Log said (Previous Card)? If no error, is your Content ID correct? Because content ID is part of the Assigned Role.  Also, do all users don't have the roles, or just you? I assume you have business user roles assigned, even just one.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Billing doc Creation idoc
entry.content: Billing doc Creation idoc. is there any idoc type that we can use to create Billing documents through Idoc

entry.title: ¡CONEXIÓN LATINA EN SAP! Charla Virtual con Sandra Solís
entry.content:
¡CONEXIÓN LATINA EN SAP! Charla Virtual con Sandra Solís - Mundo Abaper - SAP Champion

¡Una oportunidad única para la comunidad SAP paraguaya!

Tendremos el honor de conectar con Sandra Solís, SAP Champion y creadora de #MundoAbaper, quien compartirá su increíble travesía desde Latinoamérica hasta conquistar importantes escenarios del mundo SAP.

En esta charla imperdible descubriremos:

  • Cómo Sandra pasó de ser desarrolladora ABAP a ganadora del Devtoberfest y viajar a Estados Unidos
  • Recursos gratuitos que SAP ofrece y que ¡están al alcance de cualquier paraguayo!
  • Secretos para conectar con referentes internacionales como los SAP Developer Advocates
  • El camino para participar en eventos globales como #SAPTechEd ¡incluso desde Paraguay!

 

Esta charla es para ti si:

  • Estás iniciando en el mundo SAP
  • Crees que las oportunidades internacionales son inalcanzables
  • Quieres impulsar tu carrera tech más allá de las fronteras
  • Sueñas con conectar con la comunidad global de SAP

 

¡Y lo mejor! Este evento producido oficialmente por la comunidad SAP en Paraguay https://community.sap.com/

Link del Evento
https://www.linkedin.com/posts/jpzamichiei_mundoabaper-activity-7308311298402869248-XJmX?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAACLDu5gBCFC38o67lFksSV7C9OtBtVz0xEU

 

No te quedes fuera de esta conversación inspiradora que demostrará que Paraguay también tiene un lugar en el mapa mundial de SAP.

¡Te esperamos!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector 2.18 is out!
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"Certificates are crucial for maintaining secure connections, but they come with expiration dates.

As frequently requested by our users,

the new version supports automatic renewal for subaccounts, minimizing the risk of downtime due to forgotten refreshes."

 

Thanks for you message, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Tax payable posting to vendor account
entry.content:
We have a requirement to post Tax Payable from Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Pur. to vendor account. Normally we can configure posting key and vendor account as in the link - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/tax-payable-posting-to-vendor-account/ba-p/13320535.

However, the posting key cannot be changed to input vendor account within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Is there any alternative configuration to the above on SAP Public Cloud?

entry.title: Re: Maintain container with or without container unit
entry.content:
Hi @SFC ,

My previous post was for physical tracking inside the business premises...

"Can I check whether there is a way for me to view the container details outside of the freight booking app? Is there an app to view this?" " Is there a way for me to create the containers as an independent object first?"

-> These below apps to create explicit container unit then assign resource and registration/Container serial number... for tracking

"However, I am wondering whether I can achieve the same without the use of TU, i.e. container units?"->  May be yes or no, Personally I see the benefit of plan or track with exact container code (Registration Number maintained in )

Assign to resource and Registration Number would be benefit in planning and also if business wants to plan and track things in yard (Complete physical movement / fully track without any delay...), you can add yard logistics and you can benefit (see available check-in/check out/empty/loaded/loading process/cleaning/...etc in yard). 

Please let us know if you have further questions...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Recruiting Groups per legal entity
entry.content: I couldn't understand. Could you please share the steps in more detail?

entry.title: 集合貼：台灣地區常見本地化需求在SAP ERP公有雲中的實施方式建議
entry.content:
SAP ERP公有雲解決方案針對台灣地區提供了許多本地化功能，例如符合當地法規的財務報表、稅務申報、電子發票管理、資料合規處理等，完整信息可參考 Localization for Taiwan in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition。

過去幾年來，許多用戶和實施商在具體應用該系統後給予SAP大量有益的反饋。本文將聚焦其中幾個重要話題，借助架構師的見解，為台灣地區的SAP應用生態圈的客戶和實施夥伴提供參考，幫助企業更好地利用SAP ERP雲系統來推動數位化管理。

 

基於利潤中心的成本核算

利潤中心評價是企業財務管理中不可或缺的一部分，專注於評估各業務單位或部門的財務表現。透過將收入和成本歸屬於特定的利潤中心，企業能夠分析盈利能力、促進問責制及支持戰略決策制定。目前，SAP ERP公有雲暫不支援此類業務需求，参考：3371144 - Profit Center Valuation is not supported in SAP S/4HANA Cloud system 、Profit Center Valuation | SAP Customer Influence Portal 。建議企業在前期溝通中了解產品現狀及設計理念，並可能考慮依諮詢商的業務優化建議調整管理方式，運用SAP提供的最佳實踐。

 

外勞採購的稅代扣代繳與申報

在台灣，透過外勞的採購來支持企業內外需求相當常見。當地法規要求企業為這類採購進行稅代扣代繳，具體可參考：Comprehensive Overview of Withholding Tax in Taiwan。目前，SAP ERP公有雲尚未提供全面的本地化解決方案，但可了解架構師提供的變通應用方案：SAP ERP公有雲台灣本土化 - 扣繳稅方案建議。

若貴司或您的企業客戶有類似需求，歡迎透過企業S-User帳號登入以下站點頁面，投下您寶貴的一票，以助SAP產品部門更好地規劃相關功能的實現：Withholding Tax Request | SAP Customer Influence Portal。

 

台灣統一發票管理及VAT申報

依台灣地區相關法規，目前（2025年）有效的統一發票形式共有五種。SAP ERP公有雲提供了電子發票的標準端到端解決方案。關於統一發票在SAP ERP公有雲中的管理建議、方案應用注意事項及與加值中心集成申報稅務的實施方式建議，請參閱：統一發票在 SAP ERP 公有雲系統中的實施方案建議。

 

LCM報表

LCM報表是依IFRS準則下LCNRV（Lower Cost or Net Realizable Value，成本與可變現淨值孰低法，參考IAS 2 Inventories）庫存評價方法的財務報表。根據台灣法規，已上市或準備IPO的企業需要定期披露LCM報表。目前，SAP ERP公有雲中的庫存評價標準APP尚未支援LCNRV方法，企業需客製化報表以滿足相關法規需求。如需此功能，請在以下頁面投票：Inventory Valuation Enhancement for IFRS Compliance with LCNRV Method | SAP Customer Influence Portal。

 

庫齡表

台灣上市企業需藉ERP系統的庫齡表有效管理庫存資產，確保合規及財務報表的準確性，改善資產流動性，減少損失，提高競爭力。SAP ERP公有雲目前提供標準應用 "Inventory KPI Analysis" 供企業分析庫存指標。企業或SAP實施夥伴亦可透過客製化報表滿足深度定製庫齡表的需求。更多相關博客可在 SAP Community 查詢。

entry.title: Looking for SAP C_ACT_2403 Exam Practice Questions? P2pcerts Helped Me Pass on My First Try!
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

I recently passed the SAP C_ACT_2403 exam on my first attempt, and I wanted to share my experience with the resources I used. I was initially searching for reliable practice questions and came across p2pcerts after some recommendations. Let me tell you, their practice questions were a game-changer! The questions were incredibly close to what I saw on the actual exam, and they covered all the key topics in detail.

I also used the official SAP study materials, but p2pcerts really helped me solidify my understanding and build confidence. If you're preparing for the SAP C_ACT_2403 exam, I highly recommend giving p2pcerts a try. Their practice questions are worth it, and they definitely played a big role in helping me pass on my first attempt!

Good luck to everyone preparing for the exam—you’ve got this!

entry.title: Re: 𝐒𝐀𝐏 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤 𝐆𝐮𝐫𝐮𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 2024: A Remarkable Experience

entry.title: Re: Users Cannot See Their Own Contingent Worker Profile...
entry.content: Hi, do you mean user cannot switch to their other employment? Could you please check as per the attached screenshot if they can access the other profile via the Employment Switcher?

entry.title: Re: SOST emails sent from which program
entry.content: Yes. As mentioned by Sandra titles are always stored in different places. So, the issue here is that I have a huge list of emails in SOST and I would like to know what is the fastest way I am able to track back to which program are those emails generated from

entry.title: Where to Start Learning for Implementing ERP SAP in a Full-Cycle Production Enterprise?
entry.content:
Hi, 
I'm exploring the process of implementing ERP SAP and would like to understand where to start if the enterprise has a full production cycle - from ore extraction to finished product manufacturing.
Which SAP moduls and solutions should be studied first? I would appreciate any advicce, courses, or materials that can help build a step-b-step learning and preparation plan for the project.
This is a kind of search - a prototype project for implementing ERP SAP in a large enterprise with a full production cycle. I'm open to collaboration and will be happy to share the results and finding of this project. I belive this research could be valuable for other professionals involved in SAP implementation in industrial enterprise.
P.S. It would be better if there are materials available in Russian.
Looking forward to your insight and suggestions, discussions. Thank you for your time.

entry.title: Issue with Displaying Sub-Screen Data After Posting in MIGO_GR (SAP ABAP)
entry.content: I am working on MIGO_GR and need to enter data in a sub-screen. When I click the Post button for Goods Receipt, the entered data should be displayed in Display mode after posting. However, I am struggling to find the right trigger point to ensure the data is retained and displayed correctly.

entry.title: Decimal Format Inconsistency across company Codes in Smart Form Output
entry.content:
We are using two company codes, both belonging to the AU region. The decimal format maintained for AU in transaction OY01 is 1,234,567.89. However, in the Smart Form final output, the price is displaying with a comma instead of a period. For example, for company code '0002', the price is shown as 2000,00, while for company code '0001', it is displayed correctly as 2000.00.

su3:decimal Notation

OY01:decimal Notation

0002:Company code output

0001:Company code output

entry.title: How to post cost center in Surcharge Condition in SO(OR type) Billind Document In S4HC
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have situation that user want to post center center with surcharge condition. However, in S4H public cloud, OR type is not allowed to assign cost center in both sales order header or item level.

Only the sales order without charge function allows user to input cost center but the surcharge is used for normal order (i.e. OR type)

In S4H public cloud, cost center assignment from reason code is not available too. 

Any suggestion any expert could advice me. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
UIGENERATION

Generate UI using drawing.

entry.title: Re: Blog Series – SAP S/4 HANA Supply Chain for Transportation Management – 06 – Integrated consignm
entry.content:
Hi Bimal,

This is excellent blog and many thanks for jotting it down.

Could you also please help to understand where the Freight cost is finally posted? Is this to expense and profitability segment(of the fill up/pick up) or cost center? Or the freight cost is posted only when the actual sale happens that is consignment issue time?

Will really appreciate if you can throw some light on this?

Thanks and regards,

Amita Gupta

entry.title: 集锦帖：台湾地区常见本地化需求在SAP ERP公有云中的实施方式建议
entry.content:
SAP ERP公有云解决方案针对台湾地区提供了许多本地化功能，例如符合当地法规的财务报表、税务申报、电子发票管理、数据合规处理等，完整信息可参考 S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition中针对台湾的本地化功能。

过去几年中，许多用户和实施商在应用该系统后给予SAP大量有益反馈。本文将聚焦其中几个重要话题，通过架构师的见解，为台湾地区的SAP应用生态圈的客户和实施伙伴提供参考，帮助企业更好地利用SAP ERP云系统推动数字化管理。

 

基于利润中心的成本核算

利润中心评估是企业财务管理中不可或缺的一部分，专注于评估各业务单位或部门的财务表现。通过将收入和成本归集到特定的利润中心，企业能够分析盈利能力、促进问责制及支持战略决策制定。目前，SAP ERP公有云暂不支持此类业务需求，参考：3371144 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 系统中不支持利润中心评估、Profit Center Valuation | SAP Customer Influence Portal。建议企业在前期沟通中了解SAP产品现状及设计理念，并根据咨询商的业务优化建议调整企业管理方式，运用SAP提供的最佳实践。

 

外劳采购的税代扣代缴与申报

在中国台湾，通过外劳的采购来支持企业内外需求相当常见。当地法规要求企业为这类采购进行税代扣代缴，具体可参考：Comprehensive Overview of Withholding Tax in Taiwan。目前，SAP ERP公有云尚未提供全面的本地化解决方案，但可了解架构师提供的变通应用方案：SAP ERP公有云台湾本地化-代扣税实施建议。

若贵司或您的企业客户有类似需求，欢迎通过企业S-User账户登录以下页面，投下您宝贵的一票，以助SAP产品部门更好地规划相关功能的实现：Withholding Tax Request | SAP Customer Influence Portal。

 

台湾统一发票管理及VAT申报

根据台湾地区相关法规，目前（2025年）有效的统一发票形式共有五种。SAP ERP公有云提供了电子发票的标准端到端解决方案。关于统一发票在SAP ERP公有云中的管理建议、方案应用注意事项、及与加值中心集成申报VAT的实施方式建议，请参阅：台湾地区统一发票在 SAP ERP 公有云系统中的实施方案建议。

 

LCM报表

LCM报表是依据IFRS准则下LCNRV（成本与可变现净值孰低法，参考 IAS 2 Inventories ）库存估值方法的财务报表。根据台湾法规，已上市或准备IPO的企业需要定期披露LCM报表。目前，SAP ERP公有云中的库存估值标准APP尚未支持LCNRV方法，企业需定制报表以满足相关法规需求。如需此功能，请在以下页面投票：Inventory Valuation Enhancement for IFRS Compliance with LCNRV Method | SAP Customer Influence Portal。

 

库龄表

台湾上市企业需通过ERP系统的库龄表有效管理库存资产，确保合规及财务报表的准确性，改善资产流动性，减少损失，提高竞争力。SAP ERP公有云目前提供标准应用 "库存KPI分析" 供企业分析库存指标。企业或SAP实施伙伴亦可通过定制化报表满足深度定制库龄表的需求。更多相关博客可在 SAP Community 查询。

entry.title: Re: SSPI::IniSctx#1()==Specified target is unknown or unreachable
entry.content: Hello, did you find the solution to this issue?

entry.title: PO delivery address
entry.content:
Dear All,

When creating a Purchase Order, I have maintained the company code, plant, and storage location for the purchasing item.

However, I noticed that the delivery address for the PO item differs from the company code address maintained in IMG ("Edit Addresses for Company Codes").

Could you kindly advise if I might have missed any settings, or if there is a need to activate a specific scope in CBC?

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

entry.title: standard end to end process for service order using warranty related items
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to understand sap standard end to end process for service order using warranty related items. Also, how the approval process takes after release of service order. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: what is main use of Function Imports
entry.content:
Function Imports in SAP Gateway are used to expose custom actions or operations that do not fit into standard OData CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete). These functions allow you to execute business logic such as validations, calculations, or complex operations.

You should use Function Imports when:

  • You need to perform a complex operation (e.g., mass data processing).
  • The operation does not directly map to an entity in your OData model.
  • You want to trigger a BAPI, RFC, or custom ABAP logic from UI5.
  • You need a custom action (e.g., Approval, Status Change).

entry.title: Re: Implementing new output management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Private edition) and On-premise system

entry.title: EWM PGI for set of outbound deliveries with same Route programmatically
entry.content:
HI,

I have a business Requirement for doing PGI for set of outbound deliveries in same ROUTE. I am using Class name : /SCWM/CL_GOODS_MOVEMENT method : /SCWM/IF_GM_DLV~POST_DLV .  When i was trying for more than one Outbound deliveries.. it was only processing for first/one delivery from the list and No PGI for remaining outbound DO's.

sample code: 

      /scwm/cl_goods_movement=>post_dlv(
        EXPORTING
          it_dlv       = lt_dlv_post
          iv_gmcat     = /scwm/if_docflow_c=>sc_gi
          iv_post_part = CONV #( abap_true )
          iv_keep_data = abap_true
        IMPORTING
          eo_message   = DATA(lo_message_post)
      ).

      /scwm/cl_dlv_management_prd=>get_instance( )->save(
        EXPORTING
*         iv_synchronously      = abap_true     
          iv_do_commit_work     = abap_true
          iv_wait               = abap_true
        IMPORTING
          ev_rejected           = DATA(lf_rejected)
          ev_rollback_work_done = DATA(lf_rollback_work_done)
          ev_commit_work_done   = DATA(lf_commit_work_done)
          et_message            = DATA(lt_message_save)
      ).

Please Suggest and requested to share your expertise /experience on this topic.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI AI Agent: Architecture & Technical Details
entry.content:
Hello,

Unfortunately, using some GUI elements is a bit tricky. In this case, you have to iterate through all the lines of code, retrieving the content using the GetLineText() method.

Lukasz

entry.title: Resource Scheduling with SAP Standard (Out-of-the-Box) Solution Without RSH/MRS
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Our client wants to explore out-of-the-box resource scheduling functionality in SAP S/4HANA without purchasing Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planners (RSH) or Multi resource Scheduling (MRS) applications, as these require separate licenses.

Could anyone provide insights on the following?

  1. What is the business process flow for resource scheduling using only standard SAP functionalities like CM25 (Capacity Leveling) without RSH and MRS?
  2. Can we access or execute CM25 in the SAP Fiori environment?
  3. Are there any SAP articles or documentation explaining the limitations of CM25 compared to RSH?

Your guidance and references would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,
Sarvan Kumar

entry.title: Sourcing and Procurement
entry.content: How to configure when GRN is done then the requisitioner get mail notification in grow with SAP?

entry.title: Purpose of a Data Product in the Context of SAP
entry.content:
A Data Product in SAP serves several key purposes, primarily revolving around the efficient and standardized sharing and consumption of data across various applications and domains. Here are the main purposes:
 

1. Data Sharing Across Domains

Data Products enable the sharing of data across domains and application boundaries, facilitating integration and consumption by different applications, including SAP, customer, and partner applications

2. Consumption via APIs

Data Products are exposed for consumption outside the boundaries of the producing application via APIs or Events. This allows applications to offer data for consumption in a standardized manne.

3. High-Quality Metadata

Data Products are described through high-quality metadata, which is accessible through the Data Product Directory. This metadata includes business semantics, making it easier for business users to understand and utilize the data.

4. Optimized for Intensive Reads

The data set within a Data Product is optimized for intensive reads and is consumed in a read-only fashion, ensuring efficient data access and utilization.

5. Data Lineage and Integration

Data Products describe their data lineage via input ports, which are detailed as ORD Integration Dependencies. This helps in understanding the origin and transformation of data within the product.

6. Facilitating Analytical and AI Applications

Data Products are fundamental for building analytical models, designing dashboards, and training AI applications. They make business data accessible and usable to business analysts, data engineers, and data scientists.

7. Decentralized Discoverability

The discoverability of Data Products is decentralized, allowing them to be listed in the Data Product Directory and SAP Business Accelerator Hub, making it easier to find and consume relevant data.

8. Product Mindset

Data Products are managed with a product mindset, ensuring they meet the needs of consumers. Each Data Product has an owner responsible for its definition, delivery, and lifecycle.

 

One of the purpose of a Data Product in SAP Business Data Cloud is to support various analytic scenarios by providing relevant data sets. For example, a data product might include Supplier Data and Classification of Suppliers Based on Risk to support procurement execution and visibility.

Key Points

  • Curated and Enriched Data: Data products are curated and enriched to ensure high quality and relevance for specific business needs.
  • APIs and Metadata: They are exposed for consumption via APIs and described by high-quality metadata.
  • Analytic Scenarios: Data products support various analytic scenarios, such as procurement execution and visibility.
  • Data Packages: Line-of-business leaders can create and deliver data products together with relevant business content (e.g., analytical models and dashboards) in the form of "data packages," which customers can then onboard and activate in their BDC instance.

 

In summary, Data Products in SAP are designed to facilitate efficient data sharing, consumption, and integration across various applications and domains, supported by high-quality metadata and optimized for intensive reads. They play a crucial role in enabling analytical and AI applications and are managed with a product mindset to meet consumer needs.

entry.title: Re: Available Material SAP 4/HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
@AdamHorne You can check Stock - Multiple Materials -- O data Service -MMIM_MULTIPLE_MATERIAL_SRV--I guess Data Model is F0_MMIM_MATSTOCKQUANVALBYDATE

Also it is worth using the API- on product availability -ProductAvailabilityDeterminationIn

entry.title: Technical RFC Integration On-Premise-EWM 9.5 to Cloud Public 25/02
entry.content:
Background / Sceanrio:

  • We are setting up an integration between our On-Premise SAP EWM 9.5 and our Cloud Public  S/4 HANA 25/02.
  • In this scenario the Cloud Public is the “ERP” System and integrates to the “External” EWM 9.5 which is hosted within our company network.
  • The communication between the two systems is based on RFC - Remote Function Calls (Communication Scenario 0247).
  • We managed to establish the RFC communication FROM the Cloud Public TO the On-Premise EWM 9.5. This means, Master Data can already be replicated FROM Cloud Public TO the EWM via CIF (using RFC calls) and we can transfer Orders (e. g. Inbound) FROM Cloud Public TO the EWM 9.5
  • To have a full function integration via RFC Calls between the two systems it must also be possible to make RFC Calls FROM the On-Premise EWM 9.5 TO the Cloud Public (e. g. to send the Outbound Delivery order after Goods Issue posting).
  • We tried to setup this direction as described e. g. in documentation 2VJ_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf (Setting Up SAP EWM Integration - Inbound Processing from Supplier (2VJ)).

Now the problem we are facing:
One of the first steps in the Integration guidelines is to setup the RFC connection in the On-Premise system to reach out TO the Cloud Public System. In other words a communication from our company internal network towards the Cloud Public is to be established.

Whatever we tried to setup in the On-Premise EWM 9.5 and/or our Cloud Connector fails as we can not "reach" the Cloud Public system

Our Question

  1. Is it a MUST, to open the firewall / Internet security settings to allow network traffic from the On-Premise network to The SAP Cloud Public system?
    OR
  2. Do we have to establish the connection from On-Premise towards Cloud Public using special setup on the Cloud Connector / Within the BTP or something like a "Public Cloud Proxy server", etc. (if yes, can SAP provide a documentation on how to do so)?

entry.title: Re: Event Based Production and WIP reversal
entry.content: the scenario is as follows. the customer business model is such that when ever there is a spec change or any business reason the FG has to be modified they will reverse it WIP and complete the activity in the same order itself. This is also required because they also have a reporting need on the WIP in this manner. So when we do teco and GR the WIP in event based account is cleared. when we reverse it does not go to the old stage. is there any way we can achieve this to show the materials in WIP event back.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 EWM ABAP Goods movement BAPI or Class or API
entry.content: When i was trying for multiple DOCID(outbound deliveries as input) + PDO it was updating in EWM side but not in ECC side.. But for single delivery it was working .. any suggestions???

entry.title: Re: How to use Smart Link in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
ok in that case( add the smartLink to all elements in the column "Sales Document" of  table), the association Consumption.semanticObject comes to the rescue. link

In your CDS view for table, enhance it with the @Consumption.semanticObject annotation.

for example:-

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZSALES_DOC'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Sales Document List'
define view entity ZC_SalesDocument as select from ZI_SalesDocument {  

  @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 10, type: #STANDARD }]  
  @ui.identification: [{ position: 10 }]  
  @Consumption.semanticObject: 'SalesDocument'  // Enables SmartLink  
  key SalesDocument as SalesDocument,  

  @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]  
  Customer,  

  @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]  
  NetAmount  

}

Thanks,

Arun

entry.title: Re: Event Based Production and WIP reversal

entry.title: How SAP GTS handles the US International Emergency Economic Powers Act
entry.content:
Unless you have been vacationing on Mars using one of SpaceX’s spaceships, you would have been aware of the recent development in US foreign trade policy. Especially the use of the US International Emergency Economic Powers Act by the new US administration.

 

What is the US International Emergency Economic Powers Act and recent application?

 

As a short reminder (courtesy of Wikipedia), the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA), is a US legislation “authorizing the President to regulate international commerce after declaring a national emergency in response to any unusual and extraordinary threat to the United States which has its source in whole or substantial part outside the United States.”

Making use of this regulatory provision, the US administration has decided a 25% additional tariff on imports from Mexico and Canada (with energy resources from Canada having a lower 10% tariff), as well as a 10% additional tariff on imports from China. And is looking at potentially extending to other countries as well.

For more details, you can refer to the official communication: Fact Sheet: President Donald J. Trump Imposes Tariffs on Imports from Canada, Mexico and China – The White House

 

What are the consequences?

 

These new duties have to be considered for the classified products when being declared for Entry for Consumption, immediately. It can happen that now multiple additional duties represented by chapter 99 HS-Codes have to be considered.

If companies do not take immediate action their inbound supply-chain may suffer delays while importing.

 

How can SAP Global Trade Services safeguard your business?

 

Since the product world is constantly changing, the Harmonized System (HS) is also subject to regular changes. The World Customs Organization (WCO) revises the HS codes every five years, but nomenclatures that are based on the Harmonized System change at much shorter intervals.

Thankfully, SAP Global Trade Services is already equipped to help organizations react to these changes. And partner data providers also closely follow these changes and make nomenclature available to their customers rapidly so that they can remain compliant. As a result, once the required customization is performed in SAP Global Trade Services, updated custom duty rates files can be uploaded in the solution.

By accurately classifying products, companies can enable the customs authorities to control import and export of products through unique identification of those products with the matching customs tariff numbers. The customs authorities calculate the amount due to customs based on these numbers, as well as other relevant characteristics for customs control. And this applies of course to the new US requirements.

 

So the question now is, what do you need to do?

 

Well, the good news is that our expert partner Ropaar - SAP Service Company focused on Global Trade, Transportation, and Logistics, has already released a blog detailing the steps to perform: Managing Additional US HTS Codes and IEEPA Tariffs in SAP GTS

I would recommend referring to it as it contains all the relevant configuration guidance:

 

Where to find more information?

 

Whether you are new to SAP Global Trade Services or would like a few pointers, I would suggest having a look at the following resources:

  • Overview page for SAP GTS, including a high level description of key features and use cases
  • Help Portal for SAP GTS, and most specifically the section on Products and Classification
  • Configuration Guide for SAP GTS, this is the central starting point for configuring SAP Global Trade Services, edition for SAP HANA and has a dedicated chapter on Classification
  • Learning Journey Discovering the Basics of SAP Global Trade Services, especially the lesson on Classifying Products

All credits for this blog go to Torsten Stolz – Product Owner SAP Global Trade Services, who kindly put this information together at short notice and our partner Ropaar who detailed technical customization steps and allowed me to share the link to their blog.

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: Mass Upload in SAP RAP via Action Button: Excel-Based...
entry.content:
Hi, it can be achieved only for a unmanaged scenario where the data sent from UI is handled at the backend with custom code. To add the button and process the excel file, a fragment has to be created and extend the controller. Below blog will help with the details.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/excel-upload-using-rap-part-2/ba-p/13522374

Thanks in advance,

VIJAY

entry.title: From Risks to Resilience - Managing Non-Payroll Labor with SAP Fieldglass VMS
entry.content:
Contingent labor and service providers have become an even larger spend category, consuming up to 35% of companies’ total budgets. With an increasing reliance on this type of labor, risks have become more pronounced, underscoring the need for effective risk mitigation strategies.

We invite you to this webinar that outlines six critical risk types that leaders must navigate when managing contingent labor and service providers. Also, we’ll explore how each of the risk types listed below can impact businesses and discuss how automating these processes in a Vendor Management System (VMS) can mitigate them
* Regulatory Compliance and Legal Risks: Ensure compliance with local labor laws, manage misclassification, co-employment issues, and tax requirements.
* Financial Risks: Avoid budget overruns, hidden costs, fraud, and ensure accurate financial reporting.
* Security Risks: Safeguard against data breaches, cybersecurity threats, and physical security issues.
* Strategic Risks: Address talent shortages, workforce planning, and over-reliance on single providers.
* Operational Risks: Gain visibility and manage worker performance and streamline accounts payable processes.
* ESG Risks: Mitigate compliance with environmental regulations, fair labor practices, and transparency in governance.

Through case studies and real-world examples, we will demonstrate how to automate key processes, provide clear audit trails, enforce compliance, and offer unrivaled visibility into your external workforce ecosystem.

Why Attend?
* Learn how to identify and mitigate the main risks associated with managing contingent labor and service providers.
* Understand the benefits of using a VMS like SAP Fieldglass for various C-Suite executives.
* Gain actionable insights into effective risk management strategies.

Who should attend?
This webinar is a must-attend for Procurement, HR and finance professionals involved in managing contingent labor and service providers. Join us to ensure the continued success and safety of your business in a rapidly evolving labor landscape.

entry.title: Re: Using Ctrl + P on SAP B1 Web Browser
entry.content:
Hi peeraput_nithithanaanan,

Is your question about Web Client for SAP Business One or SAP Business One Browser Access?

For Browser Access, not all shortcuts are supported. Some keyboard shortcuts for SAP Business One conflict with the default browser keyboard shortcuts.

For example, in a Web browser, the keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Tab is also for switching tabs.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Create Button on Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917 ,

oApplication is the object to connect to SAP Business One application (For making UI API connection).

In order to create a Button on System Form (Purchase Order in this case), you first need to make a UI API connection as mentioned in the sample code which I shared in my previous answer.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

Before upgrade screen is

entry.title: Re: Calculating Time Interval between Two Time Feilds
entry.content:
You need to concatenate The Date and Time column to generate a timestamp, then calculate the interval:

Formula of the calculate column "IntervalDays": : DAYS_BETWEEN(TO_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT(START_DATE,START_TIME),'YYYYMMDDHHMISS'),TO_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT(END_DATE,END_TIME),'YYYYMMDDHHMISS'))

entry.title: Recommendations for Implementing Common Localization Requirements for Taiwan with SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offers various localized features tailored for the Taiwan region, such as financial reporting compliant with local regulations, tax reporting, electronic invoice management, and data compliance processing. For complete information, please refer to Localization for Taiwan in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Over the past few years, many users and implementation partners have provided SAP with valuable feedback following their practical application of the system. This blog focuses on several important topics, drawing insights from SAP solution architects to offer guidance to clients and implementation partners within Taiwan's SAP ecosystem. The goal is to help businesses better utilize the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system to drive digital management.

 

Profit Center Valuation

Profit center valuation is an important part of corporate financial management in some enterprises, focusing on evaluating the financial performance of various business units or departments. By attributing revenue and costs to specific profit centers, businesses can analyze profitability, enhance accountability, and support strategic decision-making. Currently, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition does not support this business requirement. Refer to: 3371144 - Profit Center Valuation is not supported in SAP S/4HANA Cloud system and Profit Center Valuation | SAP Customer Influence Portal. It's recommended for enterprises to understand the current SAP product status and design philosophy during preliminary discussions in the Discover phase and consider adjusting management approaches based on business optimization suggestions from consultants, using SAP's best practices.

 

Withholding and Reporting Tax for Foreign Labor Procurement

In Taiwan, it is common to procure foreign labor to support internal operation and customer sales business needs. Local regulations in Taiwan require companies to withhold and report taxes for such procurements. For details, refer to: Comprehensive Overview of Withholding Tax in Taiwan. Currently, the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition does not offer a comprehensive localized solution specifically for Taiwan, but alternative application solutions provided by architects can be explored: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Taiwan Localization - Workaround Solution for Withholding Tax.

If your company or corporate client has similar needs, feel free to log in with your company's S-User account to the following webpage to cast your valuable vote, thereby aiding the SAP product department in better planning the implementation of related functionalities: Withholding Tax Request | SAP Customer Influence Portal.

 

Government Uniform Invoice (GUI) Management and VAT Reporting in Taiwan

According to Taiwan's relevant regulations, there are currently (as of 2025) five valid forms of GUI. The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition provides a standard end-to-end solution for electronic invoicing. For recommendations on managing GUI within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, application considerations, and implementation suggestions for tax reporting integration with value-added centers, please refer to: Expert Insights on Adopting Solutions for Taiwan's Government Uniform Invoices (GUI).

 

LCM Reporting

LCM reports are financial statements based on the IFRS-standard LCNRV (Lower Cost or Net Realizable Value, according to IAS 2 Inventories) inventory valuation method. In Taiwan, companies listed or preparing for an IPO are required to regularly disclose LCM reports. Currently, the inventory valuation standard app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition does not support the LCNRV method, requiring companies to customize reports to fulfill related regulatory requirements. If you need this functionality, please vote on the following page: Inventory Valuation Enhancement for IFRS Compliance with LCNRV Method | SAP Customer Influence Portal.

 

Inventory Aging Report

Taiwan-listed companies need to effectively manage inventory assets using Inventory Aging Reports within ERP systems to ensure compliance and accuracy of financial statements, improve asset liquidity, reduce losses, and enhance competitiveness. The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition currently offers a standard application "Inventory KPI Analysis" for enterprises to analyze inventory metrics. Enterprises or SAP implementation partners can also fulfill the need for deeply customized Inventory Aging Reports through custom reporting. More related blogs can be found at  SAP Community .

entry.title: Re: SOST emails sent from which program
entry.content: First of all, did you investigate on the SCOT trace? First try on a DEV or QAS system. If you don't know how to generate an email, ask functional people to help you. If SCOT trace is fine, then discuss with your project/client if running this trace is an option.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: Join Condition using a range in Graphical...
entry.content: You can try cross join, add a additional node to filter out useless data. but the performance might be a challenge.

entry.title: Re: BW-MT Transformation lookup rule with compounded objects
entry.content:
The mentioned issue from lechnmic still exists in our system using BW-MT 1.26.15.

Difference to your Scenario @roland_szajko :
Source fields are field-based, only target fields are InfoObjects.

Original Scenario:



After saving and activating the transformation closing + reopening it, first the icon of compounding Object MSOURCE changes.
In original mainteanance it's correctly displayed with the IOBJ icon, now as field based icon even though in datatarget it's an IOBJ.

 

Then aggegation behaviour of MCONVALUE is changed, ->save and activate TRFN.

Suddenly error message appears:

Characteristic MSOURCE compounded to SSALESORG is missing in transformation source

Message no. RSTRAN075

Now, in the lookup rule for 0LOC_CURRCY the source field MSOURCE disappears  and the mapping became inconsistent.

 

Unfortunately SAP wasn't able to provide a fix since September 2024.
Case 990054/2024 - BW4HANA 2021 - inconsistent handling of HANA TRFN Lookup rules in BW-MT 1.25.42 - SAP For Me

entry.title: SAP BAS - BTP deploy failed: throw cds.error `Didn't find auth implementation for ${config}`
entry.content:
Team:

My projects were working at some point. Now, I downloaded from github and cannot be deployed OK. I created a new project and I received this error message: 

 

throw cds.error `Didn't find auth implementation for ${config}`
 
In the past, I created .cdsrc.jos containing:
{
  "requires": {
    "auth": "none"
  }
}
This used to by pass the authorisation checking. Sadly, something has change with security. I modified the MTA.YML and package.json to not use authority checking. The same error message.
 
Any help is welcome.

Tinesh B

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud version 2 blank page
entry.content: Try reading what I posted above. It needs a role. After that you still need to go Settings. It's like starting a new website, there is not magically content there.

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Data Cloud Audit Log for Application
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari 

You're right, it's the same audit.search API call, using the same request parameters like userKey, secret, etc. to pull the audit log entries for Application User ( API user). But in that case, the "authType" from the response payload would be "appKey", not "userKey". And you'll also find the name of the CDC application in the "userKeyDetails" field in the response payload. 

Hope that help 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to use the underlying draft enabled enitity seper...
entry.content:
It won't allow you to create on B directly because the composition from A creates a life-cycle dependency. It's like asking a system to create new invoice line items without first telling to which invoice they belong. This makes them orphaned until you 'attach' them to the correct invoice. The solution will be to tell the system from the start which A your new B will belong to. If you don't want to have this tight lifecycle dependency you can switch to normal associations.

To "tell the system from the start which A your new B will belong to" you can do a programmatic creation of the new B (custom action), which will create the new entity, which you can then pop on the screen for the user to complete the details.

To programmatically create new entities, you can use code like the below:

const uuid = generateUUID();
const newB = await srv.create(Entities.B, {
    ID: uuid,
    Parent_ID: a.ID
});

Have a look at the below as well, depending on what your scenario is:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-configure-a-custom-action-that-creates-a-new-object-in-cap-fiori/qaq-p/12520205

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/prefilling-fields-when-creating-a-new-entity-with-cap-node-js/ba-p/13593259

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
Dear @smitajalit,

We heard that SAP is going to deprecate basic SF login method for onboardees and force all customers to move to Login to SF via IAS for Onboardees.

I feel this is a huge mistake and was wondering if there any possibility for SAP not to deprecate basic SF login method for onboardees and keep it as an option?

Reasons:

  • The IAS account activation and QR code activation itself involves many steps, such as downloading authenticator, scanning QR code, etc. These steps are thus inherently difficult for users, especially if they are not tech savvy.
  • Onboardees accessing SF prior to day 1 are not even employees at that point. They do not have the luxury or even knowledge or effort in reaching out for support if they may face difficulties in activating IAS and logging in to SF.
    • They may easily give up and hence fail to complete key Onboarding steps such as Personal Data Collection step, posing challenges to HR teams processing their onboarding.
    • Worse, they may even give up joining the Company due to these difficulties
    • In contrast, employees typically have HR, IT, immediate Supervisor, colleagues who can assist them when they face diffculties in activating IAS account 
      • Our experience with customers also tells us that the IAS account activation does indeed pose difficulties to employees, which is why companies have Guides/FAQs/IT support dedicated to make this as painless for employees as possible.
  • I understand that for Employees, there are benefits of IAS in providing SSO to multiple platforms, not just to SuccessFactors. But for Onboardees who has yet to join the company, what multiple platforms are Companies actually giving onboardees access that make the benefits of SSO outweigh the risks caused by the inherent difficulties in account activation and login via IAS?

Overall, I feel there are way more risks than any tangible benefits for Companies to force their Onboardees to use IAS account activation steps to login to SF.

Hi @Gopinath, tagging to share this opinion with you as well. Please re-consider this deprecation lest this makes countless Onboardees' pre-day 1 experiences with the SuccessFactors Onboarding product be tarnished by the difficulties in logging in via IAS in the first place.

Thank you!

Best Regards
Ernest Lin

entry.title: Re: Need to connect to sybase db using sqlanywhere 17
entry.content: SQL Anywhere is a distinct product. You cannot use its client to connect to an ASE database.

entry.title: Re: Optional Filter Variable appears as Mandatory in ODat...
entry.content: It seems only about if you provide a default value for the paramter; if yes, you don't need to explicitly assign a value in your request.

entry.title: Re: Seeking Insight: Salary Planning using Base Salary vs...
entry.content:
Thanks a lot @xavierlegarrec. I will watch out for any updates on this topic.

Below enhancement link was found, but it seems to have lacked the necessary votes to proceed

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/47320

entry.title: Connect to sboGuiApi
entry.content:
Hi

  In below code what value should be passed to sboGuiApi.Connect. Currently it is Dummy value.

sboGuiApi.Connect("0030002");

oCompany = new SAPbobsCOM.Company();
oCompany.Server = "NDB@10.0.1.28:30015";
oCompany.DbServerType = BoDataServerTypes.dst_HANADB;
oCompany.CompanyDB = "LIVE_Database";
oCompany.UserName = "manager";
oCompany.Password = "123";
oCompany.language = BoSuppLangs.ln_English;
oCompany.UseTrusted = true;

int connectionResult = oCompany.Connect();
if (connectionResult != 0)
{
throw new Exception("Error connecting to SAP Business One: " + oCompany.GetLastErrorDescription());
}

SboGuiApi sboGuiApi = new SboGuiApi();
sboGuiApi.Connect("0030002");

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
Hi @ernlin Please find my inline response .

@smitajalit  kindly add if i missed any info:

Reasons:

  • The IAS account activation and QR code activation itself involves many steps, such as downloading authenticator, scanning QR code, etc. This steps are thus inherently difficult for users, especially if they are not tech savvy.

Gopi: Onboardee going To receive welcome email from IAS and they just going to set password to activate IAS account. It might be straight forward. i Dont see any difficulty here if IAS has configured properly.

 

  • Onboardees accessing SF prior to day 1 are not even employees at that point. They do not have the luxury or even knowledge or effort in reaching out for support if they may face difficulties in activating IAS and logging in to SF.
    • They may easily give up and hence fail to complete key Onboarding steps such as Personal Data Collection step, posing challenges to HR teams processing their onboarding.
    • Worse, they may even give up joining the Company due to these difficulties
    • In contrast, employees typically have HR, IT, immediate Supervisor, colleagues who can assist then when in activating IAS account 

Gopi :sorry am not understanding why they gonna fail with login .It similar like Gmail login page . Could you please explain bit more on challenges.Only Pre-req you should have IAS setup properly ,then ONB will work seamlessly.

  • I understand the for Employees, there are benefits of IAS in providing SSO to multiple platforms, not just to SuccessFactors. But for Onboardees who has yet to join the company, what multiple platforms are Companies actually giving onboardees access that make the benefits of SSO outweigh the risks caused by the inherent difficulties in account activation and login via IAS?

Like workzone ,they can have user experience of company portal 

Thanks,

Gopi

entry.title: Re: CO10 : CO684 - You cannot make an assignment to make-to-order stock
entry.content: I have applied SAP Note #723180 to check if it resolves the issue. However, the issue still persists when creating an order against the WBS element using transaction CO10 or CO01.Thanks for any support.

entry.title: Re: EC Mini Master - Create custom MDF and portlets, EC A...
entry.content:
MDF Portlets and Document Generation are platform features.
They can be configured and used.

I am unsure about the EC Alerts function.
